title: Mobile Production Assistant Chat Parity Specification
summary: Implemented and deployed production mobile assistant chat parity, including backend mobile chat API, native ChatSyncService, production assistant delivery, prepared-action decisions, and deterministic direct mobile todo intent.
next_action: Monitor production assistant chat latency and expand deterministic mobile intent coverage only for similarly explicit low-risk commands.

verification.format: passed for changed backend files with mix format --check-formatted; full backend format still blocked by pre-existing lib/maraithon/telegram_assistant/verification_loop.exs formatting drift
verification.typecheck: xcodebuild build passed for MaraithonMobile on iPhone 17 iOS 26.4.1 simulator
verification.build: passed: backend Fly image registry.fly.io/maraithon:deployment-01KSJ495GX670RGJ0QWTKV5FNA deployed; mobile xcodebuild build passed
verification.tests: passed: mobile_chat_controller_test, telegram_assistant_test, mobile_api_controller_test, telegram_assistant/toolbox_test, telegram_assistant_toolbox_test, MaraithonMobileTests, ChatSyncServiceTests
verification.production_simulator: passed against maraithon.com for kent@runner.now with run 20260526123256; verified magic sign-in, todo create/complete, person create/update, real production chat reply, and chat-created todo
verification.notes: Backend production app maraithon is running version 529 with image deployment-01KSJ495GX670RGJ0QWTKV5FNA. The production assistant path is live for mobile chat; an explicit direct todo intent lane prevents simple create-todo commands from timing out in the model loop while general chat remains model-backed.

resume_context.last_completed_step: Production verification passed after backend deploy and simulator run.
resume_context.notes: The implemented fix gives mobile its own production chat API and sync service while reusing Telegram assistant runtime/tooling behind a mobile surface. Direct explicit todo creation now completes instantly; general chat continues through the production assistant.

history.note: Initial mobile production assistant chat parity spec saved.
Detailed spec prepared for review; implementation intentionally deferred by user request.
Upgraded to Ready v2 with implementation-grade backend/iOS contracts, exact runner seams, schema additions, verification loop, and Apple 2026 design/privacy guidance.
Added local and Apple reference section to make the Ready v2 spec easier to verify and resume.
User requested building and verifying the spec to 10/10.
Implemented, deployed to Fly production, and verified end-to-end on the iOS simulator against maraithon.com.
